title: Dan #1835
definition:
Dan = "a judge"

 1) the 5th son of Jacob, the 1st of Bilhah, Rachel's handmaid
 2) the tribe descended from Dan, the son of Jacob

 n pr loc
 3) a city in Dan, the most northern landmark of Palestine
nasbUsage:
Definition: Dan = "a judge"

 1) the 5th son of Jacob, the 1st of Bilhah, Rachel's handmaid
 2) the tribe descended from Dan, the son of Jacob

 n pr loc
 3) a city in Dan, the most northern landmark of Palestine

    NASB:  judge, a son of Jacob, also his desc. and their territory, also a place in N. Isr.
